lines.text: [Scene: Monica and Rachel's, Chandler walks in and starts raiding the fridge. Then Rachel comes out of the shower with a towel wrapped round her waist, drying herself with another towel. Chandler and Rachel startle each other and she drops the towel for a second and snatches the rug off the couch.]

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: That is it! You just barge in here, you don't knock

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: I'm sorry!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: You have no respect for anybody's privacy!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Rachel, wait, wait.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: No, you wait! This is ridiculous!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Can I just say one thing?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: What? What?!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: That's a relatively open weave and I can still see your... nipular areas.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Oh!!

lines.text: (She storms off)
Opening Credits
[Scene: Central Perk, Phoebe is there with her boyfriend Roger, talking to Rachel and Monica.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Oh, honey, honey, tell them the story about your patient who thinks things are, like, other things. Y'know? Like, the phone rings and she takes a shower.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: That's pretty much it.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Oops!

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: But you tell it really well, sweetie.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Thanks. Okay, now go away so we can talk about you.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Okay. I'll miss you.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Isn't he great?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: He's so cute! And he seems to like you so much.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: I know, I know. So sweet... and so complicated. And for a shrink, he's not too shrinky, y'know?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: So, you think you'll do it on his couch?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Oh, I don't know, I don't know. I think that's a little weird, y'know? Vinyl.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Okaaay. (To the guys, on the couch) Any of you guys want anything else?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Oh, yes, could I have one of those. (Points)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: No, I'm sorry, we're all out of those. Anybody else?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Okay.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Did I, uh, did I miss something?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: No, she's still upset because I saw her boobies.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: You what? Wh what were you doing seeing her boobies?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: It was an accident. Not like I was across the street with a telescope and a box of donuts.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Okay, okay, could we change the subject, please?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Yeah, 'cause hello, these are not her boobies, these are her breasts.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Okay, Pheebs, I was hoping for more of a change.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Y'know, I don't know why you're so embarrassed, they were very nice boobies.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Nice? They were nice. I mean, that's it? I mean, mittens are nice.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Okaaay, (Gestures) rock, hard place, me.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: You're so funny! He's really funny! I wouldn't wanna be there when when the laughter stops.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Whoah whoah, back up there, Sparky. What'd you mean by that?

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Oh, just seems as though that maybe you have intimacy issues. Y'know, that you use your humour as a way of keeping people at a distance.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Huh.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: I mean hey! I just met you, I don't know you from Adam. ...Only child, right? Parents divorced before you hit puberty.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Uhhuh, how did you know that?

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: It's textbook.

lines.text: (Joey enters with his dad)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Hey you guys. Hey, you all know my dad, right?

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: Hey! Hey, Mr. Trib!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Hey, how long are you in the city?

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Just for a coupla days. I got a job midtown. I figure I'm better off staying with the kid than hauling my ass back and forth on the ferry. (Sees Roger) I don't know this one.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Oh, this is my friend Roger.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Hey, hey. Good to meet you, Roger.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: You too, sir.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: (To Phoebe) What happened to the, uh, puppet guy?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Dad, dad. (Shakes his head)

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Oh, 'scuse me. So Ross, uh, how's the wife? (Ross whines and lays his head on Chandler's shoulder) Off there too, uh? Uh, Chandler, quick, say something funny!

lines.text: (Chandler stays stonefaced)
[Scene: Chandler and Joey's, Mr. Tribbiani is on the phone.]

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Gotta go. I miss you too, I love you, but it's getting real late now

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: (Snatches the phone) Hey Ma. Listen, I made the appointment with Dr. Bazida, and... Excuse me? (To his dad) Did you know this isn't Ma?

lines.text: (His dad nods. Cut to later. Joey is chopping mushrooms)

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Her name's Ronni. She's a pet mortician.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Sure. So how long you been... (Goes back to chopping)

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Remember when you were a little kid, I used to take you to the navy yard and show you the big ships?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Since then?!

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: No, it's only been six years. I just wanted to put a nice memory in your head so you'd know that I wasn't always such a terrible guy. ...Joe. Y'ever been in love?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: ...I d'know.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Then y'haven't. You're burning your tomatoes.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: You're one to talk. (Puts the mushrooms in a saucepan)

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Joe, your dad's in love big time. And the worst part of it is, it's with two different women.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Oh man. Please tell me one of 'em is Ma.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Of course, course one of 'em's Ma. What's the matter with you.

lines.text: [Scene: Monica and Rachel's, Joey is lamenting to everyone about hid dad's affair.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: It's like if you woke up one day and found out your dad was leading this double life. He's like actually some spy, working for the C.I.A. (Considers) That'd be cool.... This blows!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: I know, I mean, why can't parents just stay parents? (She walks over near Chandler and his gaze stays very obviously on her chest) Why do they have to become people? Why do they have... (Notices Chandler) Why can't you stop staring at my breasts?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: (Without looking up) What? (Looks up) What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Did you not get a good enough look the other day?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Alright, alright. We're all adults here, there's only one way to resolve this. Since you saw her boobies, I think, uh, you're gonna have to show her your peepee.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Y'know, I don't see that happening?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: C'mon, he's right. Tit for tat.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Well I'm not showing you my 'tat.'

lines.text: (Door buzzer goes)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Hello?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: (Intercom) It's Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: (Intercom) And Rog.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: C'mon up.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: (Sarcastic) Oh, good. Rog is here.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: What's the matter with Rog?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Oh, it's nothing, it's a little thing... I hate that guy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: What, so he was a little analytical. That's what he does, y'know? C'mon, he's not that bad.

lines.text: (Cut to Chandler, Ross and Roger sitting at the table. Ross is upset)

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Y'see, that's where you're wrong. Why would I marry her if I thought on any level thatthat she was a lesbian?

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: I dunno. Maybe you wanted your marriage to fail.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Why? Why would I why? Why? Why? Why?

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: I don't know. Maybe maybe low self-esteem, maybe maybe to compensate for overshadowing a sibling, maybe you...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Wait-wait, go back to that sibling thing.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Well, I don't know. I mean, it's conceivable that you wanted to sabotage your marriage so that the sibling would feel less of a failure in the eyes of the parents.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: That that's ridiculous! I don't feel guilty for her failures!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Oh! So you think I'm a failure!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Isn't he good?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Nonono, thatthat's not what I was saying...

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Y'know, all these years, I thought you were on my side. But maybe what you were doing was sucking up to Mom and Dad so they'd keep liking you better!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: Hey, I married a lesbian to make you look good!

lines.text: (Cut to later. Rachel is in tears)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: You're right! I mean you're right! It wasn't just the Weebles, but it was the Weeble Play Palace, and and the Weebles' Cruise Ship. Oh, which had this little lifeboat for the Weebles to wobble in.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: That's tough. Tough stuff. C'mon, Pheebs, we're gonna catch that movie, we gotta get going.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Oh, okay. Feel better, Rachel, 'kay?

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Geez, we're gonna be late, sweetie...

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Oh, okay. Listen, thanks for everything, Mon.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: You're welcome.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Listen guys, it was great seeing you again. Mon, um, easy on those cookies, okay? Remember, they're just food, they're not love.

lines.text: (He shuts the door and Ross and Monica fling cookies at it)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Hate that guy! (Throws another cookie)

lines.text: [Scene: The Hallway, Chandler and Joey are just leaving Monica and Rachel's.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Night, you guys.

lines.text: (They notice that a woman is sitting by their door)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Oh look, it's the woman we ordered.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Hey. Can, uh, can we help you?

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Oh, no thanks, I'm just waiting for, uh, Joey Tribbiani.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: I'm Joey Tribbiani.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Oh no, not you, big Joey. Oh my God, you're so much cuter than your pictures! (Joey stares at her) I-I'm, I'm Ronni....Cheese Nip?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Uh, Joey's having an embolism, but I'd go for a Nip, y'know?

lines.text: Commercial Break
[Scene: Chandler and Joey's, Ronni is talking to Chandler. Joey's dad is not around.]

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Now, y'see, most people, when their pets pass on, they want 'em sorta laid out like they're sleeping. But occasionally you get your person who wants them in a pose. Like, chasing their tail, (Demonstrates) or, uh, jumping to catch a frisbee.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Joey, if I go first, I wanna be looking for my keys.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: That's a good one!

lines.text: (Joey's dad enters.)

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Hey, Joe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Dad, Ronni's here.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Huh?

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Hey! Hello, babe! Wh what're what're you doing here?

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Oh, uh, well, you left your good hair at my apartment, I figured you'd need it tomorrow for your meeting. (Hands him the hair)

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Thank you. Uh...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: So, who's up for a big game of Kerplunk?

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Look, I uh, I shouldn'ta come. I-I'd better get going, I don't wanna miss the last train.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: I don't want you taking that thing.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Oh, where'm I gonna stay, here?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Who-ah-ho.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: We'll go to a hotel.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: (Shrugs) We'll go to a hotel.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: No you won't.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: No we won't.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: If you go to a hotel you'll be...doing stuff. I want you right here where I can keep an eye on you.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: You're gonna keep an eye on us?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: That's right, mister, and I don't care how old you are, as long as you're under my roof you're gonna live by my rules. And that means no sleeping with your girlfriend.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Wow. He's strict.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Now dad, you'll be in my room, Ronni uh, you can stay in Chandler's room.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Thanks. You're, uh, you're a good kid.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: C'mon, I'll show you to my room. ...That sounds so weird when it's not followed by "No thanks, it's late."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Okay. Now this is just for tonight. Starting tomorrow, you gotta make a change. This has gone on long enough.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: What kinda change?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Well, either you break it off with Ronni

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: I can't do that!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Then you gotta come clean with Ma! This is not right!

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Yeah, but this is

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: I don't wanna hear it! Now go to my room!

lines.text: [Scene: Chandler and Joey's, night. Chandler and Joey are sharing the sofabed in the living room. Joey is restless.]

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Hey, Kicky. What're you doing?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Just trying to get comfortable. I can't sleep in my underwear.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Well, you're gonna.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: I've been thinking. Y'know, about how I'm always seeing girls on top of girls...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Are they end to end, or tall like pancakes?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Y'know what I mean, about how I'm always going out with all these women. And I always figured, when the right one comes along, I'd be able to be a stand-up guy and go the distance, y'know? Now I'm looking at my dad, thinking...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Hey, you're not him. You're you. When they were all over you to go into your father's pipe-fitting business, did you cave?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: No.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: No. You decided to go into the out-of-work actor business. Now that wasn't easy, but you did it! And I'd like to believe that when the right woman comes along, you will have the courage and the guts to say "No thanks, I'm married."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: You really think so?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Yeah. I really do.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Thanks, Chandler. (Snuggles up to him)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Get off!

lines.text: [Scene: Monica and Rachel's, morning. Someone knocks on the door and Monica gets it.]

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Hi...May I help you?

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Yeah, uh, Joey said I could use your shower, since, uh, Chandler's in ours?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Okay...who are you?

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Oh, I'm Ronni. Ronni Rappelano? The mistress?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Oh, c'mon in.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Thanks.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Hi, I'm Rachel.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Hi.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Bathroom's up there.

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Great.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Hey, listen, Ronni, how long would you say Chandler's been in the shower?

lines.speaker: Ronni
lines.english: Oh, like, uh, five minutes?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Perfect. Fasten your seatbelts, it's peepee time. (She goes into Joey and Chandler's apartment, where Mr. Tribbiani is reading the paper) Hey, Mr. Trib.

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Hey. Morning, dear.

lines.text: (Rachel goes up to the door of their bathroom)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Chandler Bing? It's time to see your thing.

lines.text: (She opens the door and whips back the curtain. It's Joey. They both scream)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: (Runs out in a towel) What's the matter with you?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: I thought it was Chandler!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: (Comes out of his room) What? What?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: You were supposed to be in there so I could see your thing!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Sorry, my my thing was in there with me.

lines.text: [Scene: Central Perk, everyone is there as Phoebe enters.]

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: Hey, Pheebs.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Hey.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: How's it going?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Good. Oh oh! Roger's having a dinner thing and he wanted me to invite you guys.

lines.text: (Chandler laughs)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: So what's going on?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Nothing, um, it's just, um... It's Roger.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: I dunno, there's just something about...

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Basically we just feel that he's...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: We hate that guy.

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: Yeah. Hate him.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: We're sorry, Pheebs, we're sorry.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Uh-huh. Okay. Okay, don't you think, maybe, though, it's just that he's so perceptive that it freaks you out?

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: ...No, we hate him.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: We're sorry.

lines.text: [Scene: Chandler and Joey's apartment, Joey is trying to turn the sofabed back into a sofa. Someone knocks on the door and it rears up at him.]

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Ma! What're you doing here?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Tribbiani
lines.english: I came to give you this (Gives him a bag of groceries) and this. (Whacks him round the ear)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Oww! Big ring!

lines.speaker: Mrs. Tribbiani
lines.english: Why did you have to fill your father's head with all that garbage about making things right? Things were fine the way they were! There's chicken in there, put it away. For God's sake, Joey, really. (She gives the sofabed a tiny push and it folds away)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Hold on, you-you knew?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Tribbiani
lines.english: Of course I knew! What did you think? Your father is no James Bond. You should've heard some of his cover stories. "I'm sleeping over at my accountant's," I mean, what is that? Please!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: So then how could you I mean, how could you?!

lines.speaker: Mrs. Tribbiani
lines.english: Do you remember how your father used to be? Always yelling, always yelling nothing made him happy, nothing made him happy, not that wood shop, not those stupid little ships in the bottle, nothing. Now he's happy! I mean, it's nice, he has a hobby.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Ma, I don't mean to be disrespectful, but... what the hell are you talking about?! I mean, what about you?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Tribbiani
lines.english: Me? I'm fine. Look, honey, in an ideal world, there'd be no her, and your father would look like Sting. And I'll tell you something else. Ever since that poodle-stuffer came along, he's been so ashamed of himself that he's been more attentive, he's been more loving... I mean, it's like every day's our anniversary.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: I'm...happy...for you?

lines.speaker: Mrs. Tribbiani
lines.english: Well don't be, because now everything's screwed up. I just want it the way it was.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Ma, I'm sorry. I just did what I thought you'd want.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Tribbiani
lines.english: I know you did, cookie. Oh, I know you did. So tell me. Did you see her?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Yeah. You're ten times prettier than she is.

lines.speaker: Mrs. Tribbiani
lines.english: That's sweet. Could I take her?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: With this ring? (Her engagement ring.) No contest.

lines.text: [Scene: Central Perk. Phoebe is there with Roger.]

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: What's wrong, sweetie?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Nothing, nothing.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Aaaah, what's wrong, c'mon. (Pats his leg. She lies down and rests her head in his lap)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: It's, I mean, it's nothing, I'm fine. It's my friends. They-they have a liking problem with you. In that, um, they don't.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Oh. They don't.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: But they don't see all the wonderfulness that I see. They don't see all the good stuff and all the sweet stuff. They just think you're a little...

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: What?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Intense and creepy.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Oh.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: But I don't. Me, Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Well, I'm not I'm not at all surprised they feel that way.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: You're not? See, that's why you're so great!

lines.speaker: Roger
lines.english: Actually it's, it's quite, y'know, typical behaviour when you have this kind of dysfunctional group dynamic. Y'know, this kind of co-dependant, emotionally stunted, sitting in your stupid coffee house with your stupid big cups which, I'm sorry, might as well have nipples on them, and you're like all 'Oh, define me! Define me! Love me, I need love!'.

lines.text: [Scene: Monica and Rachel's, Joey is letting everyone in on the new developments.]

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: So you talked to your dad, huh.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Yeah. He's gonna keep cheating on my ma like she wanted, she's gonna keep pretending she doesn't know even though she does, and my little sister Tina can't see her husband any more because he got a restraining order...which has nothing to do with anything except that I found out today.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Wow.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: Things sure have changed here on Waltons mountain.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.english: So Joey, you okay?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Yeah, I guess. It's just parents, after a certain point, you gotta let go. Even if you know better, you've gotta let them make their own mistakes.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: Just think, in a couple of years we get to turn into them.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.english: If I turn into my parents, I'll either be an alcoholic blond chasing after twenty-year-old boys, or... I'll end up like my mom.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: (entering) Hey.

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: Hey, Pheebs.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: How's it going?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Oh, okay, except I broke up with Roger.

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: Awww.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Yeah, right.

lines.speaker: All
lines.english: Aaawwwwww!!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.english: What happened?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: I don't know, I mean, he's a good person, and he can be really sweet, and in some ways I think he is so right for me, it's just... I hate that guy!

lines.text: Closing Credits
[Scene: Monica and Rachel's. Phoebe is reading the paper and Joey enters.]

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.english: Hey, Joey. What's going on?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Clear the tracks for the boobie payback express. Next stop: Rachel Green. (He goes into the bathroom. We hear a scream and he comes out, closely followed by Monica in a towel)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Joey!! What the hell were you doing?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.english: Sorry. Wrong boobies.

lines.text: (He leaves. Cut to Monica entering Chandler and Joey's apartment. She sneaks up to the shower door)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.english: Hello, Joey.

lines.text: (She whips back the curtain to reveal Joey's dad)

lines.speaker: Mr. Tribbiani
lines.english: Oh! ...Hello, dear. (She whips the curtain shut in horror)

lines.text: End
